# PERF-014 positive: filepath.Glob inside a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-014-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"path/filepath"
	"sort"
)

func Collect(root string, patterns []string) []string {
	all := make([]string, 0)
	for _, p := range patterns {
		matches, _ := filepath.Glob(filepath.Join(root, p))
		all = append(all, matches...)
	}
	sort.Strings(all)
	return all
}
